name: prison-block
summary: Individual cells along a central guard-walk. Iron bars, hard stone floors, shackles, no comfort.

primary_palette.note: row of 3 barred cells along one wall
double-loaded — cells on both long walls
central exposure corner — public punishment within the block

story_prompts: mostly empty, only two cells occupied — political prisoners in separated cells
long-abandoned, cell doors rusted open, straw rotted to dust
interrogation in progress — guards at central pillory, block otherwise quiet
anti_patterns: cells need to be enclosed — use partial walls or cell-door props to close each bay
don't place props inside cell cells — cells should feel stripped bare
guard station or desk near the entrance — someone controls this space
